description: A hearty, soul-warming chicken casserole combining tender chicken, egg noodles, corn, creamy sauce, and a crispy French fried onion topping. Perfect for family dinners and potlucks.
ingredients: [{"name": "egg noodles", "unit": "cups, cooked", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "chicken", "unit": "cups, cooked and shredded", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "corn", "unit": "cups (frozen or canned)", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "milk", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "cream of chicken soup", "unit": "cans (10 oz each)", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "onion", "unit": "diced", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "garlic", "unit": "tablespoon, minced", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "cheese", "unit": "cup, shredded", "amount": "1/2"}, {"name": "bacon", "unit": "cup, cooked and chopped", "amount": "1/2"}, {"name": "French fried onions", "unit": "cup", "amount": "3/4"}, {"name": "salt and pepper", "unit": null, "amount": null}]
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 9×13 baking pan with cooking spray. In a medium bowl, combine cooked egg noodles, shredded chicken, corn, milk, cream of chicken soup, diced onion, minced garlic, shredded cheese, chopped bacon, salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly. Pour mixture into the greased baking pan and spread evenly. Sprinkle French fried onions evenly on top. Bake for approximately 30 minutes until bubbly and golden brown. Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
notes: Sauté onions and garlic for extra flavor. Use rotisserie chicken for convenience. Add hot sauce or cayenne for a spicy kick. Freeze without topping for make-ahead meals.
tags: rotisserie chicken, egg noodles, cream of mushroom substitute, gluten-free casserole, vegetarian casserole
